faqs.question: How do I reset my password?
faqs.answer: Go to the login page and click 'Forgot password'. Enter your account email and you'll receive a reset link within a few minutes. The link expires after 30 minutes.

faqs.question: How do I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
faqs.answer: Go to Account Settings > Billing > Change Plan. Upgrades apply immediately with a prorated charge. Downgrades apply at the start of your next billing cycle.

faqs.question: What is your refund policy?
faqs.answer: We offer full refunds within 14 days of purchase for annual plans, and within 7 days for monthly plans. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days.

faqs.question: How do I cancel my subscription?
faqs.answer: Go to Account Settings > Billing > Cancel Subscription. You'll retain access until the end of your current billing period.

faqs.question: Why is my payment failing?
faqs.answer: Payment failures are usually due to an expired card, insufficient funds, or the bank blocking the charge. Update your card under Account Settings > Billing > Payment Method.

faqs.question: Is there an API available?
faqs.answer: Yes, all Pro and Enterprise plans include API access. You can generate an API key under Account Settings > Developer > API Keys.
